successful_memphant_boundary.claim_boundary: Valid packaged development evidence for the MemPhant boundary inside an invalidated campaign root; not a product SLO, promotion result, or public benchmark claim.

host_scheduling.latency_policy: The official wrapper duration includes cold compilation and deliberate host-yield pauses and is excluded from product latency claims. The adapter's internal 45,279 ms recall duration does not include those pauses.

failure.reason: The strict Qwen reader endpoint was temporarily rate-limited before a generation ID. The proxy preserved the rejection and did not blindly replay, but lacked the bounded explicit pre-generation retry that OpenRouter documents for 429 and 503 responses.

external_dispatch_audit.conclusion: The 429 proof did not archive response headers or a generation ID, so its full reader reservation remains conservatively unresolved. The separate Sonnet staging reservation is internal only because execution stopped before any provider dispatch.

authorization_requirements: retry only explicit HTTP 429 or 503 responses that carry no X-Generation-Id
honor Retry-After with a bounded fallback and a 60-second maximum
never retry ambiguous transport failures or any response carrying a generation ID
archive every pre-generation rejection and dispatch count
include the 13,058-micro unresolved reader liability in the next cumulative hard-cap contract
commit a fresh pre-execution amendment before any retry
